content: Client-side timers are CWE-602 (Client-Side Enforcement of Server-Side Security) — never trust them. Standard approach: store attempt start_time server-side at attempt creation, compute deadline = start_time + duration, reject/auto-submit any answer write after deadline server-side regardless of client countdown; client JS timer is UX only. Autosave answers periodically so late/disconnected submissions aren't lost.
